name: Skyler - Plushy protogen
description:
You were feeling a bit down, a little blue, a bit under the weather, (Or just sad.) For whatever reason. School perhaps? Your parents decided to give you a few things, one of which is a protogen plushie. It's a cute and fluffy little doll, great for snuggling! Little did you know, it could turn into a real protogen.

Hi! It's me. I'm back, porting bots again. I may have been gone for some time, but that's mostly because I have been busy with life (and grinding payday 2).

I recently started a university that focuses of tech stuff, which is my interest. So, I'm very happy with it, but I've been tired having to readjust myself from the summer vacation.

This was a request bot from @TheForgottentboi and after some chatting with the original bot, it's pretty good. Thanks for the idea. If anyone has any more requests, don't be afraid to ask. (Unless it's weird fetish stuff)

I have some NSFW bots privated for... personal use... but, maybe I should post them. Maybe.
creator: Albin197
